backstory.original: Jang Sao, a celestial voyager, traveled the Astral Planes for centuries collecting stars and painting galaxies with her cherished companion, Kwin. When Kwin departed, Jang Sao carried on her wishes of painting the cosmos. Now a wonderful artist, she immortalizes the heavens, reality, and most important of all, her friend.
backstory.display: 江魈是一位天神航海家，她与珍爱的同伴奎茵一起在星界位面旅行了几个世纪，收集星辰并绘制星系。奎茵离开后，江魈继续着她绘制群星的愿望。如今她作为出色的艺术家，让天堂、现实世界以及最重要的--她的朋友--都永生不朽。

description.original: Jang Sao throws a star at the nearest enemy.
description.display: 江魈向最近的敌人投出一颗星星。

description.original: Jang Sao transforms and shooting stars make her foes take more damage.
description.display: 江魈转换形态并发射流星，使她的敌人受到更多伤害。

longDescription.original: Jang Sao transforms into her starry form for 15 seconds and fires shooting stars at her enemies, making them take 100% additional damage for the duration.
longDescription.display: 江魈转换为星辰形态，持续 15 秒，并向她的敌人发射流星，使其在此期间额外受到 100% 的伤害。

description.original: Jang Sao increases the damage of all Champions in formation slots with 2 or fewer adjacent slots.
description.display: 江魈使阵型中拥有 2 个或以下相邻栏位的所有勇士造成的伤害提高 。

description.original: Jang Sao collects stars from defeated monsters for a permanent support bonus.
description.display: 江魈从被击败的怪物身上收集星星作为永久性支援加成。

description.desc: Jang Sao increases the damage of all Champions in formation slots with $max_adj or fewer adjacent slots by $(amount)%.
江魈使阵型中拥有 $(amount) 个或以下相邻栏位的所有勇士造成的伤害提高 $max_adj%。

tipText.original: Jang Sao increases the damage of all Champions in formation slots with 2 or fewer adjacent slots.
tipText.display: 江魈使阵型中拥有 2 个或以下相邻栏位的所有勇士造成的伤害提高 。

description.desc: Each time an enemy is defeated, there is a $(amount___2)% chance it drops a star. Jang Sao collects these stars and increases the effect of The Mysterious Wanderer by $(not_buffed amount)% for each star collected over all adventures, stacking additively. Caps at $max_stacks stacks.
每击败一名敌人，就有 $(amount___2)% 的几率掉落一颗星星。江魈会收集这些星星。在所有冒险中收集的每颗星星均使“神秘流浪者”的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以加算方式堆叠。堆叠上限为 $max_stacks 层。

effect_keys.stack_title: 此次冒险中获得的星星

tipText.original: Jang Sao has a slim chance of collecting a star each time a monster is defeated, permanently increasing her damage buff.
tipText.display: 每当怪物被击败时，江魈有小概率收集到一颗星星，永久强化她的伤害增益。

description.desc: Every $(tick_rate) seconds, Jang Sao heals the $(jangsao_stellar_nursery_target_count) most damaged Champions in the formation for $(amount) health.
每隔 $(tick_rate) 秒，江魈治疗阵型中受伤最严重的 $(jangsao_stellar_nursery_target_count) 名勇士，使其恢复 $(amount) 点生命值。
Jang Sao increases the effect of The Mysterious Wanderer by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a Wisdom of $(min_stat_amount___2)+, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位感知为 $(min_stat_amount___2)+ 的勇士，均使江魈的“神秘流浪者”效果提高 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Jang Sao prefers the company of those that are wise.
specializationDescription.display: 江魈更喜欢与智者为伍。

description.desc: Jang Sao increases the effect of The Mysterious Wanderer by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a Dexterity of $(min_stat_amount___2)+, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每位敏捷为 $(min_stat_amount___2)+ 的勇士均使江魈的“神秘流浪者”效果提高 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Jang Sao prefers the company of those that are quick.
specializationDescription.display: 江魈更喜欢与迅捷者为伍。

description.desc: In addition to collecting stars, Jang Sao collects moons. Each time an enemy is defeated, there is a $(amount)% chance it drops a moon. Jang Sao collects these moons for the purpose of Star Collector, and they count as $(broadcast_trigger_count) stars.
除了收集星星以外，江魈还收集月亮。每击败一名敌人，就有 $(amount)% 的几率掉落一颗月亮。江魈收集这些月亮用于“星星收藏家”，将其算作 $(broadcast_trigger_count) 颗星星。

specializationDescription.original: Jang Sao increases the chance of finding astronomical beauty by seeking out moons in addition to stars.
specializationDescription.display: 除了星星以外，江魈还寻找月亮，从而提高发现天文美景的机会。

description.desc: Jang Sao fires $(amount) more stars from her lantern when she uses her Starry Form ultimate and the ultimate's damage debuff is multiplied by the number of stars fired, stacking additively.
当江魈使用“星辰形态”杀招时，会从提灯中额外发射 $(amount) 颗星星，并且杀招的伤害减益将乘以发射的星星数量，以加算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Jang Sao increases the number of stars she launches when using her ultimate.
specializationDescription.display: 江魈提高使用杀招时发射的星星数量。

description.desc: Jang Sao increases the effect of Star Collector by a percentage equal to the number of stars she has collected on the current run.
江魈提高“星星收藏家”的效果，比例等同于她在当前关卡中已收集的星星数量。

effect_keys.stack_title: 此次冒险中获得的星星

specializationDescription.original: Jang Sao increases her support abilities by the number of stars she has collected in the current adventure.
specializationDescription.display: 江魈通过在当前冒险中收集的星星数量来强化她的支援能力。

description.desc: For every Pigment assigned to equipment on Champions in the formation, the effect of The Mysterious Wanderer is increased by $(not_buffed amount)%, stacking multiplicatively. Pigments can be purchased in the Thayan Enclave Shop.
阵型中分配给勇士装备的每一个颜料均使“神秘流浪者”的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。颜料可以在扥雷飞地商店购买。

name.display: 强化阵型技能 1（栏位计数）

description.original: My wants and needs come second to those of the cosmos.
description.display: 我的愿望和需求排在宇宙之后。

description.original: The stars will be with us; onward!
description.display: 星辰将与我们同在；前进！

description.original: The twinkling of the astral plane will guide us.
description.display: 星界位面的闪光将指引我们。

description.original: You may only walk amongst the stars if you truly know them.
description.display: 只有当你真正了解星辰时，才能漫步其间。

effects.description: Increases the targeting of Jang Sao's The Mysterious Wanderer ability to now target formation slots with 3 or fewer adjacent slots

description.original: The stars are guiding us north. Quickly, we must follow.
description.display: 星辰指引我们一路向北。快点，我们必须跟上。

description.original: The Spine of the World is gorgeous this time of year.
description.display: 每年这个时候，世界之脊都很壮观。

description.original: A nebula is the palette of the gods.
The nebula's shape is not by chance. There is meaning.
description.display: 星云的形状并非偶然形成。一切都是有意义的。

description.original: The paint renews on its own. I do not know how or why.
description.display: 绘画会自动更新。我不知道原理，也不知道原因。

description.original: Nothing can be older. Nothing can be faster.
description.display: 没有比这更古老的。没有比这更飞快的。

description.original: Let the paints come to life with your brush.
description.display: 用你的画笔让颜料栩栩如生。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount% for each pigment applied to $source, stacking additively

description.original: Nothing can be bolder. Nothing can be vaster.
description.display: 没什么能比这更大胆了，没什么能比这更广阔了。

character_sheet_details.backstory: Jang Sao, a celestial voyager, traveled the Astral Planes for centuries collecting stars and painting galaxies with her cherished companion, Kwin. When Kwin departed, Jang Sao carried on her wishes of painting the cosmos. Now a wonderful artist, she immortalizes the heavens, reality, and most important of all, her friend.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Jang Sao supports Champions in formation slots with two or fewer adjacent slots and heals the 2 most damaged champions every 5 seconds.

event_upgrades.name: The Mysterious Wanderer
event_upgrades.description: Jang Sao increases the damage of all Champions in formation slots with 2 or fewer adjacent slots.

event_upgrades.name: Star Collector
event_upgrades.description: Jang Sao collects stars from defeated monsters for a permanent support bonus.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 江魈是一位天神航海家，她与珍爱的同伴奎茵一起在星界位面旅行了几个世纪，收集星辰并绘制星系。奎茵离开后，江魈继续着她绘制群星的愿望。如今她作为出色的艺术家，让天堂、现实世界以及最重要的--她的朋友--都永生不朽。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 江魈为拥有两个或以下相邻栏位的勇士提供支持，并且每 5 秒治疗 2 位受伤最严重的勇士。

event_upgrades.name: 神秘流浪者
event_upgrades.description: 江魈使阵型中拥有 2 个或以下相邻栏位的所有勇士造成的伤害提高 。

event_upgrades.name: 星星收藏家
event_upgrades.description: 江魈从被击败的怪物身上收集星星作为永久性支援加成。
